narrative:
Jackson 25 (precinct in Stark County) has 856 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
